title: Breakwave Dry Bulk Shipping Report 17.08.2021
summary:
Main
Capesize rates reach 40k once again; Is 50k the next stop? - In a span of less than four months, Capesize average spot rates have now topped 40k
Source: Breakwave Advisors

Linked asset: 2021-08-18_breakwave-dry-bulk-shipping-report-17-08-2021_breakwaveaugust172021report_09fb4ca1e231.pdf

Dry Bulk Shipping
August 17, 2021
Breakwave Dry Futures Index: 3,592 Baltic Dry Index (spot): 3,606 Short-term Indicators:
↑ 30D: 13.2% ↑ 30D: 18.7% Momentum: Neutral
↑ YTD: 262.6% ↑ YTD: 164.0% Sentiment: Positive
↑ YOY: 116.5% ↑ YOY: 126.1% Fundamentals: Positive
Bi-Weekly Report
• Capesize rates reach 40k once again; Is 50k the next stop? - In a span of less than four months, Capesize average
spot rates have now topped 40k twice without experiencing a significant drawdown in between.
